title: El señor Tormenta
writer: José María Fernández Unsáin, Jesús Murcielago Velázquez
actors: Julio Aldama, Angélica María, Jaime Fernández
plot: Gambling manager Zavala's henchmen beat up the Cavernario wrestler for not losing a match. Then Zavala makes the star of the star Patricia, girlfriend of the promising César, to bribe him when he faces the incorruptible Señor Torm...
